title: potentilla glabra var. mandshurica
intro: Potentilla glabra var. mandshurica, also known as the Chinese cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla glabra var. mandshurica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
